title: salvia scabiosifolia subsp. adenostachya
intro: Salvia scabiosifolia subsp. adenostachya, also known as the "pineleaf sage", is a subspecies of perennial plant in the sage family, Salvia, native to Mexico. The medicinal properties of Salvia scabiosifolia subsp. adenostachya include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve cognitive function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Salvia scabiosifolia subsp. adenostachya include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and support overall well-being.
